# Elena Kagan

Associate Justice, U.S. Supreme Court (2010-present). Nominated by Barack Obama. Confirmed 63-37. Previously served as Solicitor General of the United States (2009-2010) and Dean of Harvard Law School (2003-2009). Never served as a judge before SCOTUS appointment.

Profile pending enrichment.
